textByHash.1a0f928028974300565dc1f5a6bcd7e79e9849bd: You're not even wearing proper guards uniform!
textByHash.2bb128fb685baefc661bbcf0bac00fbcbd1bde6e: Well, this is the guards' entrance. I might be new here but I can tell you're not a guard.
textByHash.3b17865f89227e0d4210900815f8d061f2fdc668: Get lost. This is private property.
textByHash.5703ee77c56f7fd02e55ba291a269026b1afd3e3: Well you can see me wearing it. It's an iron chainbody and a medium bronze helm.
textByHash.81c3b53f14f35dbba4dea963fd5b00ac86b51bed: This fortress belongs to the order of Black Knights known as the Kinshra.
textByHash.8212e49de7f141104aba7d115cbf59fde0119084: I heard something happened to King Arthur and that Lord Daquarius was behind it.
textByHash.a413edcaf992c0d54a8fd1b7f95a6a89b1240e70: Of course. It was so clever of Lord Daquarius to lend our men to Morgan Le Faye in exchange for our prize. We got the better end of the deal, no doubt.
textByHash.a916495d4b1460facdd9674994bad49a5d55af6c: I have no idea, but it's a great victory for Lord Daquarius. To take such a mighty supporter of the White Knights down... Truly brilliant.
textByHash.b80f45c00bbede862d5b58f7c9284a004e3e5bdc: Hey! You can't come in here! This is a high security military installation!
textByHash.d70bb80deab636572debf554ecce9b11780b5dda: Good day, brave knight. Congratulations on your victory against King Arthur.
textByHash.e211c5955396afa985ce6da707b0ade3aea66417: I wouldn't go in there if I were you. Those Black Knights are in an important meeting. They said they'd kill anyone who went in there!
